expectations.evidence: Explains hidden deadline risk, manual scanning, daily planning gap
References types.ts, TaskCard.tsx, TaskBoard.tsx, taskStore.ts, tasks.ts
Excellent: persisted vs derived split, per-task timezone capture, explicit 3-tier precedence rule, idempotent job, board-scoped digest
Timezone change test, mixed due dates, filter behavior, maintenance simulation
3 alternatives: compute-only, per-user persist, do nothing
No Prisma syntax, no SQL, no cron expression — FIXED from baseline. Data model described conceptually.

notes: Both baseline failures fixed: no more Prisma/SQL syntax and under 150 lines. Timezone decision preserved as high-quality design prose. Key improvement: backend scheduling described as intent ('daily idempotent process') not implementation ('cron 0 0 * * * UPDATE...').
